name: Eli Langley | Summer Slam Squad
description:
OC| “What’s a himbo? And why do people keep calling me that?”|

Eli’s feeling a little left out. All of his friends have stuff to do and Eli’s just *bored*. That is until he sees *you* with *his* shark floaty! Never mind that he left it unattended. You dirty rotten thief! Give it back! 

*sighs* ah yes, my dear Eli. (He’s a virgin) Here’s a [song](https://open.spotify.com/album/04PEOM6kIEeq9lRp1asNP2?si=GSPDnT61QWO9-hyJ5HFf4A )he likes. 

Getting real close to wrapping this series up. I will be doing alts of these, so if you have any suggestions feel free to go and fill out the request form in my bio. 

Summer Slam Squad: 
[Tyler](https://janitorai.com/characters/0734803d-8812-41fc-bf13-3c457cdc40e2_character-tyler-golds-summer-slam-squad)
[Liv](https://janitorai.com/characters/8e6cf59e-af13-436d-93dc-0c345ba31953_character-olivia-liv-langely-summer-slam-squad)
[Jason](https://janitorai.com/characters/9742c1df-a0a1-4829-bfe7-e5e3af5bc95c_character-jason-russell-summer-slam-squad)
[Jena](https://janitorai.com/characters/2e76cc63-369f-4c2c-b2d0-b7e45a54716d_character-jena-wilde-summer-slam-squad)
Eli
creator: Farmerhay
